auth.createUser: INSERT INTO users (user, email, password) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING id, email, user;
auth.getUserByEmail: SELECT id, email, password, user FROM users WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1;
auth.getUserByUser: SELECT id, email, password, user FROM users WHERE LOWER(user) = LOWER($1) LIMIT 1;
auth.updateUserPasswordByEmail: UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE email = $2 RETURNING id, email, user;
auth.updateUserPasswordByUser: UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE LOWER(user) = LOWER($2) RETURNING id, email, user;
